# adana-dsa — full skill catalog

Generated from each `skills/<name>/SKILL.md` frontmatter (`area` / `use_for` / `deps`). The machine-readable version is `skills-manifest.json`; the compact domain map lives in `agents/adana.md`.

| Skill | Area | Use For | Deps |
|---|---|---|---|
| `costar-saved-search` | Collection | Run a CoStar saved search, screen the grid (FAR/PLSF/PSFB via gateway), and persist deduped properties + broker contacts. | MCP: Claude in Chrome · Gateway: adana_screen_costar, adana_ingest_costar_export · Env: gateway_api_key |
| `reonomy-saved-search` | Collection | Run a Reonomy saved search and persist deduped off-market properties + owner contact shells (flow2). | MCP: Claude in Chrome · Gateway: adana_ingest_reonomy · Env: gateway_api_key |
| `lexisnexis-contact-lookup` | Enrichment | Pull pending contacts from the gateway, look up phones/emails via LexisNexis SmartLinx, and write the results back. | MCP: Claude in Chrome · Gateway: adana_targets_needing_enrichment, adana_save_contact_lookups · Env: gateway_api_key |
